perturbation.original_text: 2. The text of Section 2. A. and B. of the Agreement is hereby deleted in its entirety and the following language is inserted in its stead: [***]
perturbation.changed_text: 2. The text of Section 2. A. of the Agreement is hereby deleted in its entirety and the following language is inserted in its stead: [***]
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'and B.' from this section, it introduces an in-text contradiction because the agreement may have references to section 2.B later on. This omission creates ambiguity regarding the status and applicability of Section 2.B, as other sections that refer to it would now be referencing a potentially non-existent part of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3. To the extent, if any, that provision of this Agreement conflicts with or differs from any provision of the Agreement, such provision of this Second Amendment shall prevail and govern for all purposes and in all respects.
perturbation.justification: The original text deletes both Section 2.A and 2.B, while the changed text only deletes Section 2.A. This introduces a contradiction because if other sections of the agreement refer to Section 2.B (as suggested by the explanation), there will be conflict. The amended Section 3 now conflicts with these references, as it implies that its terms should prevail, but the existence of Section 2.B is now in question. Therefore, there is a strong contradiction because the removal of 'and B.' creates ambiguity regarding the status and applicability of Section 2.B.

perturbation.original_text: WHEREAS, the parties hereto desire to further amend the Agreement to modify the provisions of the Agreement regarding [***] of the term thereof; and
perturbation.changed_text: WHEREAS, the parties hereto desire to further amend the Agreement to modify certain provisions of the Agreement; and
perturbation.explanation: By removing the phrase 'regarding [***] of the term thereof,' the modified text introduces uncertainty about which specific provisions of the Agreement are being amended. If subsequent sections of the agreement rely on knowing which part of the 'term' is being modified, they would be rendered ambiguous or contradictory. This creates an in-text contradiction because the rest of the amendment assumes the scope of modification is well-defined, which is no longer the case.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3. To the extent, if any, that provision of this Agreement conflicts with or differs from any provision of the Agreement, such provision of this Second Amendment shall prevail and govern for all purposes and in all respects.
perturbation.justification: The modified text removes the specific subject of the amendment ('regarding [***] of the term thereof'), creating ambiguity. The contradicted text (section 3) states that the amendment prevails over conflicting provisions of the original agreement. Because the amendment's scope is now unclear, any provision in the original agreement that relates to the 'term' could potentially be superseded, even if that was not the parties' intention. The change introduces an inconsistency and uncertainty regarding which specific provisions are affected. The parties agreement that this amendment governs when there are conflicts now loses meaning since the scope of the amendment is ambiguous.

perturbation.original_text: 4. Except as modified hereby, the Agreement and its terms and provisions are hereby ratified and confirmed for all purposes and in all respects.
perturbation.changed_text: 4. The Agreement and its terms and provisions are hereby ratified and confirmed for all purposes and in all respects, except in cases of future disagreements.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'except in cases of future disagreements' undermines the entire purpose of the contract. If the agreement is not confirmed in all circumstances except future disagreements, there's no binding agreement, because any party could claim disagreement to avoid the contract obligations. This creates a direct contradiction, as the agreement first confirms all terms then immediately creates a loophole to ignore them, rendering the entire exercise meaningless.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1. The preamble hereto is incorporated herein and, by this reference, is made a substantive part hereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces an exception ('except in cases of future disagreements') that undermines the ratification and confirmation of the agreement. This directly contradicts the contradicted text (which incorporates the preamble as a substantive part), because any party can claim a disagreement to avoid obligations defined in the preamble. This meets the definition of 'Omissions – In Text Contradiction' as essential language is altered in a way that breaks obligations/constraints and renders the entire agreement unenforceable. The agreement is now uncertain, as the parties can choose to ratify the agreement at their own discretion.
